# La Mesa — Ceramics Studio & Creative Lab

> La Mesa is a ceramics studio and multidisciplinary creative lab located in La Barceloneta, Barcelona. We offer weekly classes, drop-in sessions, wheel throwing courses, creative workshops and private sessions. Tone: welcoming, informal, community-focused. We are hosts, not teachers.

## Services
- Weekly ceramics class (hand-building): €120/month, 1×/week, 2h per session
- Drop-in class (Clase Suelta): minimum 2 hours, booking via Cal.com
- Wheel intro course (Intro al Torno): €90, 2 sessions × 2h, max 2 people
- Taller Flex (flexible hours): 8h=€120 / 12h=€180 / 16h=€240 / 20h=€300
- Wheel coworking: contact via WhatsApp
- Creative workshops: variable, see website
- Private sessions (team building, birthdays, bachelorette): custom quote

## Location
Carrer de l'Atlàntida 47, La Barceloneta, 08003 Barcelona, Spain

## Contact
- Web: https://www.lamesabcn.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/34711552030
- Email: lamesa.lc@gmail.com
- Instagram: @lamesa.lc

## Shop
- Etsy: https://www.etsy.com/es/shop/LaMesaLC

## Opening Hours
- Tuesday: 14:00–20:30
- Wednesday: 14:00–18:00
- Friday: 11:00–18:00
- Monday: 15:00–17:00

## Languages
Spanish (primary), Catalan, English

## About
Founded by Lau and Vick. La Mesa is not a traditional school — it is a creative space where people come to make things with their hands, connect with others, and slow down. All materials and firings included. High-temperature clay.
